theory.intro: When two signs touch between numbers, replace them with a single sign.
steps: Find the two touching signs between the numbers.
Same signs (− and −) → write a single +.
Different signs (+ and −) → write a single −.

foundation.question_text:
Rewrite with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$7 + (-4)$

Rewrite with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$-5 + (-2)$

Rewrite with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$6 - (-2)$

Rewrite with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$-3 - (-8)$

Rewrite with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$5 + (+4)$

Rewrite with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$-9 + (+6)$

Rewrite with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$8 - (+3)$

Rewrite with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$-4 - (+7)$

development.question_text:
Rewrite every touching pair with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$12 + (-5) + (-3)$

Rewrite every touching pair with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$4 - (-6) + (-2)$

Rewrite every touching pair with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$-8 + (+3) - (-5)$

Rewrite every touching pair with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$7 - (+2) - (-9)$

Rewrite every touching pair with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$-6 + (-4) - (+1)$

Rewrite every touching pair with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$3 - (-7) + (+2)$

mastery.question_text:
Rewrite every touching pair with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$-10 + (-3) - (-8) + (+1)$

Rewrite every touching pair with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$15 - (+4) + (-6) - (-9)$

Rewrite every touching pair with a single sign. Do not evaluate.
$-2 - (-7) - (+3) + (-5)$
